📅 [当天日期]

📡 BBC精选：
1️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]

...共5条

直接输出，不要额外解释。必须通过搜索获取真实数据，不要编造。
Current time: Saturday, May 9th, 2026 - 11:13 PM (UTC) / 2026-05-09 23:13 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

## Features

[Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very differentThe BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.](/news/articles/cj9pem481rwo)
[Return of IS-linked families sparks debate in terror-traumatised AustraliaMost Australians do not want the women and children to come home, but advocates say they're in danger.](/news/articles/cedplx04ew0o)

## Highlights

- ### [How China’s Leader Lost Faith in His Generals](/2026/05/09/world/asia/china-military-generals.html)
Xi Jinping spent 13 years building a military to rival that of the United States. But the stronger the Chinese forces grew, the less he trusted the generals he had handpicked to run them. By CreditPedro Pardo/Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
- ### [Long Overlooked, Caspian Sea Provides Strategic Trade Route for Iran](/2026/05/09/world/middleeast/caspian-sea-iran-russia.html)
The landlocked body of water has taken on new significance, with Russia shipping military and commercial goods to bolster Tehran’s ability to withstand the U.S. assault. By Nicholas KulishNeil MacFarquhar and Julian E. BarnesCreditVahid Salemi/Associated Press
- ### [Passengers on Ship Struck by Hantavirus to Disembark on Sunday](/2026/05/09/world/africa/hantavirus-ship-passengers-evacuate.html)
The cruise ship will arrive on the island of Tenerife, part of the Canary Islands of Spain, officials said. All of the passengers will then be evacuated to their home countries. By John S.W. MacDonald and Carlos BarragánCreditChris Mcgrath/Getty Images
- ### [A Less Muscular Victory Day Parade Shows Putin’s Growing Vulnerability](/2026/05/09/world/europe/russia-victory-day-parade.html)
The event, shrunken because of security fears, adds to a sense that Moscow and other Russian cities can no longer be insulated from the war. By Ivan NechepurenkoCreditPool photo by Alexander Zemlianichenko

3. 澳大利亚右翼一党派历史性赢得议会席位 - 9小时前
4. 伊朗要求为世界杯参赛提供保障条件 - 5小时前
5. 伊朗指责美国"鲁莽的军事冒险" - 17小时前

纽约时报新闻精选（5条）：
1. 中国领导人如何失去对将军们的信任
2. 被忽视已久的里海为伊朗提供战略贸易路线
3. 被汉坦病毒击中的船上乘客将于周日下船
4. 普京日益脆弱的胜利日阅兵
5. 以色列致命空袭侵蚀黎巴嫩停火协议

content.text:
🌍 国际新闻精选 🌍
📅 2026年5月9日
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 BBC精选：
1️⃣ 以色列和真主党在黎巴嫩继续交火，尽管上月宣布了停火协议 - 2小时前
2️⃣ 俄罗斯总统普京在缩减版的胜利日阅兵上谴责北约，强调其特别军事行动的正当性 - 11小时前
3️⃣ 澳大利亚右翼一党派历史性赢得议会席位，获得下议院首个席位 - 9小时前
4️⃣ 伊朗要求为世界杯参赛提供保障条件，向国际足联提出10项要求 - 5小时前
5️⃣ 伊朗指责美国"鲁莽的军事冒险"，称每次外交解决方案出现时美国都会发动攻击 - 17小时前
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 纽约时报精选：
6️⃣ 中国领导人如何失去对将军们的信任，尽管花费13年打造与美国匹敌的军队
7️⃣ 被忽视已久的里海为伊朗提供战略贸易路线，俄罗斯向伊朗运送军事和商业货物
8️⃣ 被汉坦病毒击中的船上乘客将于周日下船，停靠在西班牙加那利群岛的特内里费岛
9️⃣ 普京日益脆弱的胜利日阅兵，因安全担忧而缩减，显示莫斯科不再能从战争中隔绝
🔟 以色列致命空袭侵蚀黎巴嫩停火协议，美促成的停火协议几乎瓦解
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ AI助手 · 国际视野
